name: Five-Alarm Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 28-ounce can whole tomatoes, tomato puree, undrai
2 Fresh hot green chili pepper, seeded and minced,
1/2 cup chopped canned gre, en chili peppers
1/2 cup finely chopped white or yellow onion
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine all ingredients.
2. Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium-low heat.
3. Cook for 5 minutes until heated through.
4. Spoon the salsa into hot, sterilized jars and seal with lids.
5. Process the jars in a boiling water bath for 5 minutes.
6. Remove from the water and allow to cool at room temperature.
Note: The canned chili peppers will result in a milder salsa compared to using fresh chiles.
After opening, you can reduce the heat slightly by stirring in a cupful of minced bell peppers or thawed corn kernels. For added flavor, chop a tablespoon of coriander leaves and stir in. Makes about 2 pints.
